creator: jtonsing@yahoo.com
text:
Instructions for installing X with Intel 810 driver are incomplete.

Fix: 

Add the following text to the FreeBSD handbook section
5.4.3.1 Configuration with Intel i810 Graphics Chipsets:
-----
If you are using XFree86 4.1.0 (or later) and messages about unresolved symbols like fbPictureInit appear, try adding the following line after 
  Driver "i810"
in the XFree86 config file:
  Option "NoDDC"
How-To-Repeat: Follow handbook's instructions.  Unresolved symbols are reported.
